race.comment: JUNGLE FEVER (1) turned in an eye-catching run last start over 1000m at this track, winding up hard from well back on straightening to finish a close second. Has a terrific record here with two wins and four minor placings from six starts. Hard to beat and deserves a win. EVERYBODY RISE (4) was finally off the mark with a maiden win here last time when resuming from a spell over 1000m. Fitter again and reunites with Taylor Marshall who was on board last start. Honest overall and can make it back-to-back wins. A TOUCH FROM FAYT (10) switches to synthetic for the first time. Finished 7 lengths back in fifth on turf over 1100m at Ipswich most recently. Sure to be tougher to beat this time. MARATHIA (6) has been in the placings her past two starts, finishing second over 1050m at Gold Coast Poly last time out. Worth including again. FITZROY STREET (8) just missed fresh and can only be improved.
